title: フェブラリーSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the February Stakes, the first of the
races Smart Falcon declared she'd win. A sense of
excitement fills the air at Tokyo Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how Smart Falcon's gonna do. What if
she stumbles right off the bat?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hm... She was pretty good last year, but I
wouldn't say she's the best.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You know, I think this is my first time watching a
dirt race. I'm actually getting pretty hyped up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon can feel the energy of the venue
even from the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...I wonder how high we can go?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Well, Tokyo Racecourse is also home to the
Japanese Derby, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is a high-profile turf race
exclusive to classic-year racers, many of whom
stake their dreams on it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The Derby is on the same level as the Arima
Kinen... or bigger, even.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I was just wondering how close we can get to that.
choice_data_list: It's a high hurdle, for sure.
It's a high hurdle, for sure.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the Derby is a super special race—I know
that! No matter how hard I chase it, I can't get
there right now.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Still, we're getting plenty of attention!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I can place first today, the next race will get
just a little more special!
choice_data_list: And you'll have to keep on winning.
And you'll have to keep on winning.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know. We won't have a story if I go losing right
at the start.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have to win and become the trending topic. That
way, I'll be all smiles on the year-end stage!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...All right! Time to kick things off on the right
foot!
